instruction: Help me enter the bug information into the bug tracker

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Bug Report
Bug ID: BUG-2025-0312
Reporter: QA Engineer Xu Hao
Found Date: 2025-03-12
Module: User Center - Login
Description: Occasional white screen during WeChat QR login, ~30% reproduction rate
Severity: High
Priority: P1
Assigned To: Backend Developer Cui Ming' > /home/user/Desktop/bug_report.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Bug ID'; ws['B1'] = 'Module'; ws['C1'] = 'Severity'; ws['D1'] = 'Priority'; ws['E1'] = 'Reporter'; ws['F1'] = 'Assigned To'; ws['G1'] = 'Found Date'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/bug_tracker.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Help me enter the bug information into the bug tracker

Fill the bug information from /home/user/Desktop/bug_report.txt into /home/user/Desktop/bug_tracker.xlsx row 2: A2='BUG-2025-0312', B2='User Center - Login', C2='High', D2='P1', E2='Xu Hao', F2='Cui Ming', G2='2025-03-12', save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/bug_tracker.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'BUG-2025-0312' in s else 'FAILED')"
